statement: In every magma, Equation 2377 (`x = (y * (z * (x * w))) * y`) implies Equation 1139 (`x = y * ((y * (z * z)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0227
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op x w))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op z z)) z))
